label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out between what times Andrew could have gone to the clothing store. The store was closed after 9pm, so the latest he could go is before 9pm. First, let me list out all the times Andrew was seen doing other things: - Andrew woke up at 5am. So he's up then, but that's the starting point. - William saw him playing tennis from 5am to 6am. So from 5-6am, he's at the tennis court. - Jessica saw him buying lunch at the deli from 6am to 9am. So 6-9am, he's at the deli.
